source_jobs.title: Analyst/Associate
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT THE ROLE

As an Analyst/Associate at Equal Ventures, you will work with the partnership to develop and refine investment theses, source new investments, and support portfolio companies from seed through scale.

You will be expected to own deals end-to-end, represent Equal externally with founders and ecosystem partners, and help level up the firm through content, events, and internal initiatives.

This role is based in person at our New York City office. Compensation for the role will depend on seniority and experience and includes a base salary in the range of $60k–$150k, guaranteed fund carry, and the opportunity to earn an annual performance bonus.

Core responsibilities include

 - Proactively sourcing high-quality early-stage opportunities through founder relationships, ecosystem engagement, and outbound channels

 - Supporting investment diligence, including market analysis, customer and expert calls, and conviction-driven memo writings

 - Supporting portfolio companies on operations, hiring, go-to-market, fundraising, and partnerships

 - Building Equal’s brand and presence within the ecosystems that we operate in by producing content, hosting and attending events, and extending relationships with key points of influence in our industries and the broader venture capital ecosystem.

 - Supporting the firm’s overall operations: we’re a small team and everyone works together to own workstreams that help level-up the firm




ABOUT YOU

Experience

 - 1-4 years of relevant professional experience

 - Background in venture capital, growth equity, private equity, consulting, banking or a high-impact operating role

 - Experience working with technology companies and/or within our major verticals



Attributes

 - Hustle — As a small firm, we win through persistence, perseverance and sweat above all else.

 - Professional — Takes immense pride in the detail, thoroughness, accuracy, and overall quality of their work.

 - Self-directed — Works with team members to complete tasks without someone looking over their shoulder.

 - Team Player — We like everyone in our firm to feel like an owner of the firm, which requires all of us to go above and beyond to support each other and the overall interests of the firm.

 - Inquisitive — Obsessed with learning.

 - Connector — Brings a depth of venture and industry connections to the table and is eager to build more.

 - Integrity — Never sacrifice ethics for economics.




APPLICATION

If you are interested, please fill out the application on this website. You will be asked to respond to the following questions:

 1. What are 1-2 sectors or investments that you are most excited about investing in over the next few years and why?

 2. What are 2-3 companies that you find particularly interesting that have raised less than $5m? Why do you think they are exciting?

 3. In 100 words or less, why you?



We will follow up directly if there is a strong fit.

source_jobs.title: Climate Principal / Partner
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT THE ROLE

As a Principal or Partner at Equal, you will operate as a senior investor with meaningful autonomy and responsibility. You will work closely with the partnership to shape Equal’s climate and energy strategy while owning end-to-end execution across sourcing, diligence, investment decisions, and portfolio support. You will also spearhead and scale our community experiences across the space, such as our annual Climate Capital Summit https://www.climatecapitalsummit.com/.

This role is based in person at our office in New York City. In-person collaboration is an important part of our team culture. Title, compensation, and economics will be commensurate with experience and seniority. All members of our firm receive carry.

Compensation for the role will depend on seniority and experience and includes a base salary in the range of $200k–$300k, guaranteed fund carry, and the opportunity to earn an annual performance bonus.




CORE RESPONSIBILITIES INCLUDE

 - Owning and evolving Equal’s climate and energy investment theses across key sub-sectors

 - Proactively sourcing high-quality early-stage opportunities through founder relationships, ecosystem engagement, and outbound research

 - Leading investment diligence, including market analysis, customer and expert calls, and conviction-driven memo writing

 - Driving investment decisions and representing Equal on boards or in close advisory relationships with founders

 - Supporting portfolio companies on strategy, hiring, go-to-market, fundraising, and partnerships

 - Building Equal’s brand and presence within the climate and energy ecosystem through producing content, hosting and attending events, and extending relationships with key points of influence in energy and the broader venture capital ecosystem

 - Serving as lead for Equal’s Climate Capital Summit https://www.climatecapitalsummit.com/

 - Supporting the firm’s overall operations: we’re a small team and everyone works together to own workstreams that help level-up the firm




ABOUT YOU

Experience

 - 7+ years of relevant professional experience

 - Background in venture capital, growth equity, private equity, or a high-impact operating role at a climate or energy startup

 - Strong familiarity with climate or energy markets, technologies, and value chains

 - Prior experience leading investments or owning meaningful diligence processes is strongly preferred



Attributes

 - Industry expert — A detailed understanding of the energy/climate venture landscape with the ability to predict trends, evaluate emerging companies in the sector and influence key decision makers.

 - Hustle — As a small firm, we win through persistence, perseverance and sweat above all else.

 - Professional — Takes immense pride in the detail, thoroughness, accuracy, and overall quality of their work.

 - Self-directed — Works with team members to complete tasks without someone looking over their shoulder.

 - Team Player — We like everyone in our firm to feel like an owner of the firm, which requires all of us to go above and beyond to support each other and the overall interests of the firm.

 - Connector — Brings a depth of venture and industry connections to the table and is eager to build more.

 - Integrity — Never sacrifice ethics for economics.




APPLICATION

If you are interested, please fill out the form here https://equalvc.typeform.com/to/oLMOrdql. You will be asked to respond to the following questions:

 1. Share more about your experiences across climate and/or energy and what you are looking for out of your next role?

 2. What are one or two climate or energy subsectors you are most excited about and why?

 3. What is a company that you find particularly interesting that has raised less than $5m? Why do you think it is exciting?

 4. In 100 words or less, what is missing from the early-stage climate/energy investing ecosystem? What can/should Equal bring to the ecosystem that has yet to be provided by other investo

source_jobs.title: VP / Head of Engineering (Portfolio Company Role)
source_jobs.description:
Several of our fast-growing portfolio companies are looking for senior engineering leaders (VP / Head of Engineering). If you are interested, please fill out your details and we will reach out if there is a fit within the portfolio.

Seeking individuals that have prior experience taking ownership of engineering at high growth startup or tech companies.

Seeking individuals that have prior experience taking ownership of marketing at high growth startup or tech companies.

source_jobs.title: CMO/VP Marketing (Retail Vertical AI Company)
source_jobs.description:
One of our fast-growing portfolio companies is looking for a senior marketing leader to join them as they scale their operations and footprint.

If you are interested, please fill out your details and we will reach out if there is a fit.

Seeking individuals that have prior experience taking ownership of marketing at high growth startup or tech companies. Bonus points if you have prior experience in the retail or eCommerce industry.

source_jobs.title: Head of Growth (Retail Vertical AI Company)
source_jobs.description:
One of our fast-growing portfolio companies is looking for a generalist Head of Growth to join them as they scale their operations and footprint.

If you are interested, please fill out your details and we will reach out if there is a fit.

Seeking individuals that have prior experience taking ownership of marketing at high growth startup or tech companies. Bonus points if you have prior experience in the retail or eCommerce industry.

notes: Investment firm with portfolio company roles
